summary: I was born in Macon, Georgia on October 28, 1912. My parents were Emma and Allen Freeman, though I don't know much about my father. I left Macon when my family moved to Dublin, Georgia before eventually settling in Lakeland, Florida in 1925 when I was about twelve years old.

After being born in Macon, my family moved to Dublin, Georgia where I attended school until we came to Lakeland in 1925. I only went as far as the second grade in Dublin before I had to stop school to work. Dublin was part of my early life before settling permanently in Lakeland.

Lakeland, Florida has been my home since 1925 when I was twelve years old. My wife Ruby and I married here on February 16, 1935, and our children were born here as well. I have worked various jobs around Lakeland including fruit cutting near Highland City and caddying at the Cleveland Heights Golf Course. We rent a small house here and live a simple life, often struggling but hopeful for better days.
cues: worked fruit cutting near Highland City
caddied at Cleveland Heights Golf Course

summary: Ruby, my wife, was born in Cocoa, Florida but her family moved to Monticello, Florida when she was very young. She attended school there up to the sixth grade. Monticello was part of her early life before she left to live in Lakeland, where we married and started our family.
cues: left Monticello before marrying in Lakeland

summary: One of my first steady jobs was working for the Atlantic Coast Line Railroad. I started there after carrying water for a construction company in 1925 and earned about $15 a week. I held that job until 1932 before moving on to other work. It was a good job and I often wish I could have a job like that again.
cues: worked for Atlantic Coast Line Railroad

summary: After losing my railroad job and working odd jobs, I caddied for a while at the Cleveland Heights Golf Course. It was a temporary job before I began cutting fruit for the Highland City Association. Though caddying was not a long-term career, it helped me get by during tough times.
cues: caddied at Cleveland Heights Golf Course

summary: I worked cutting fruit for the Highland City Association, which is located about eight miles from Lakeland. We picked grapefruit, oranges, and tangerines in crews of 14 or more, and I was experienced in handling ladders and fruit without damage. This was my main source of income until the crew was recently laid off due to prices and lack of fruit.

I once joined the Bethel African Methodist Episcopal Church on North Dakota Avenue but did not attend regularly. My wife Ruby is very devout and has become Holy Sanctified, attending church every night and living a spiritual life. I admire her faith and have a desire to be sanctified like her, though I have not yet fully committed to the church.
cues: wife Ruby is devout and Holy Sanctified

summary: Ruby has a brother named Charlie Glenn who lives in Healthville, Virginia. Although I have not lived there, Virginia is part of my wife's family connections. Ruby has been away from home for nearly five years, but her family ties to Virginia remain important to her.
cues: Ruby's brother Charlie Glenn lives in Healthville, Virginia
Ruby away from home nearly five years
